home.heroTagline: A sacred abode of Lord Hanuman on the banks of the Khoh river
home.heroIntro: Shri Sidhbali Baba Dham is situated in Kotdwar, Garhwal, Uttarakhand — about 230 km from Delhi and 76 km from Haridwar. Devotees from across the country visit this holy shrine to seek the blessings of Sidhbali Baba.
home.sevasDesc: Offer seva and participate in the daily rituals, bhandara and special pujas at the temple.
home.darshanDesc: The temple is open for darshan from 5:00 AM to 9:00 PM, every day of the week.
home.accommodationDesc: Dharamshalas and guest houses are available near the temple for visiting devotees.
